name: DataForSEO
description: REST API for SEO data (SERP, keyword volume, competitors, backlinks). DACH-friendly via location_code 2756 (CH) / 2276 (DE) / 2040 (AT).

auth.instructions: Combine login:password and Base64-encode the result. Send as `Authorization: Basic <encoded>`. The secret stored in the vault is the pre-encoded token, not the raw login/password pair.

endpoints.description: Live SERP for a keyword on Google. Pass tasks[] with keyword + location_code + language_code.
Search volume + CPC for an array of keywords. Best for keyword-research workflows.
Related-keyword expansions via DataForSEO Labs (Standard tier).
Backlink-profile summary for a target domain.

guidelines: Wrap one keyword (or one target) per task object in the POST body; DataForSEO accepts arrays of tasks per call.
Use Switzerland location_code (2756) + language 'de' for DACH-relevant queries.
Always use the /live/ variant for synchronous responses; avoid the queue-based endpoints for interactive workflows.
Re-use the same login:password pair across calls; rotation requires re-encoding the Base64 token.
avoid: Never fire parallel requests — DataForSEO blocks concurrent calls per credential and the second call returns 429.
Don't pass HTML-encoded characters in keywords; use raw UTF-8.
Don't shape the request body as a flat object — it must always be a tasks[] array.
Don't store the raw login/password split as two vault entries; the auth flow expects the pre-combined Base64 token.
notes: Per docs https://docs.dataforseo.com/v3/auth: no parallel requests, ~2 req/s soft cap per account.
Pricing (Standard tier, 2026-05): ~$0.0006 per SERP task. Confirm per endpoint via /merchant pricing call.
Response shape nests tasks[0].result[0].items[] — agent should apply response_shape projection to keep the LLM context lean.
